"""
一時スクリプト: 有料老人ホーム関連リードのStatus__c分布を調査
"""
import sys
import os

sys.path.insert\(0, r'C:\\Users\\fuji1\\OneDrive\\デスクトップ\\Salesforce_List'\)
from src.utils.config import sf_config
import requests


def authenticate\(\):
    """Salesforce OAuth認証"""
    r = requests.post\('https://login.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/token', data={
        'grant_type': 'refresh_token',
        'client_id': sf_config.CLIENT_ID,
        'client_secret': sf_config.CLIENT_SECRET,
        'refresh_token': sf_config.REFRESH_TOKEN,
    }\)
    token_data = r.json\(\)
    inst = token_data['instance_url']
    token = token_data['access_token']
    return inst, token


def query_all\(inst, token, soql\):
    """SOQLクエリを実行し、全レコードを取得"""
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    url = f"{inst}/services/data/v59.0/query"
    records = []
    resp = requests.get\(url, headers=headers, params={'q': soql}\).json\(\)
    records.extend\(resp.get\('records', []\)\)
    while not resp.get\('done', True\):
        resp = requests.get\(f"{inst}{resp['nextRecordsUrl']}", headers=headers\).json\(\)
        records.extend\(resp.get\('records', []\)\)
    return records


def print_results\(label, records\):
    """結果を整形して表示"""
    print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
    print\(f"  {label}"\)
    print\(f"{'='*60}"\)
    if not records:
        print\("  \(結果なし\)"\)
        return
    for rec in records:
        filtered = {k: v for k, v in rec.items\(\) if k != 'attributes'}
        parts = []
        for k, v in filtered.items\(\):
            parts.append\(f"{k}: {v}"\)
        print\(f"  {' | '.join\(parts\)}"\)
    print\(f"  --- 合計 {len\(records\)} 行 ---"\)


def main\(\):
    print\("Salesforce認証中..."\)
    inst, token = authenticate\(\)
    print\(f"認証成功: {inst}"\)

    # クエリ1: Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' のみ
    q1 = \(
        "SELECT Status__c, COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "WHERE Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社' "
        "GROUP BY Status__c "
        "ORDER BY COUNT\(Id\) DESC"
    \)
    results1 = query_all\(inst, token, q1\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ1: Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社'",
        results1
    \)

    # クエリ2: Company OR ServiceType__c
    q2 = \(
        "SELECT Status__c, COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "WHERE \(Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' OR ServiceType__c LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%'\) "
        "AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社' "
        "GROUP BY Status__c "
        "ORDER BY COUNT\(Id\) DESC"
    \)
    results2 = query_all\(inst, token, q2\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ2: \(Company OR ServiceType__c LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%'\) AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社'",
        results2
    \)

    # クエリ3: 総件数
    q3 = \(
        "SELECT COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "WHERE \(Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' OR ServiceType__c LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%'\) "
        "AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社'"
    \)
    results3 = query_all\(inst, token, q3\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ3: 総件数 \(Company OR ServiceType__c + 株式会社\)",
        results3
    \)

    # クエリ4: 全Lead Status__c 分布 \(上位20\)
    q4 = \(
        "SELECT Status__c, COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "GROUP BY Status__c "
        "ORDER BY COUNT\(Id\) DESC "
        "LIMIT 20"
    \)
    results4 = query_all\(inst, token, q4\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ4: 全LeadのStatus__c分布 \(上位20件\)",
        results4
    \)

    print\("\\n完了。"\)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main\(\)
PYEOF)

"""
一時スクリプト: 有料老人ホーム関連リードのStatus__c分布を調査
"""
import sys
import os
import json

sys.path.insert\(0, r'C:\\Users\\fuji1\\OneDrive\\デスクトップ\\Salesforce_List'\)
from src.utils.config import sf_config
import requests


def authenticate\(\):
    """Salesforce OAuth認証"""
    r = requests.post\('https://login.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/token', data={
        'grant_type': 'refresh_token',
        'client_id': sf_config.CLIENT_ID,
        'client_secret': sf_config.CLIENT_SECRET,
        'refresh_token': sf_config.REFRESH_TOKEN,
    }\)
    token_data = r.json\(\)
    inst = token_data['instance_url']
    token = token_data['access_token']
    return inst, token


def query_sf\(inst, token, soql\):
    """SOQLクエリを実行し、全レコードを取得（集計クエリ対応）"""
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    url = f"{inst}/services/data/v59.0/query"
    resp = requests.get\(url, headers=headers, params={'q': soql}\).json\(\)
    
    # エラーチェック
    if isinstance\(resp, list\) and len\(resp\) > 0 and 'errorCode' in resp[0]:
        print\(f"  エラー: {resp[0]['errorCode']} - {resp[0]['message']}"\)
        return []
    
    records = resp.get\('records', []\)
    while not resp.get\('done', True\):
        resp = requests.get\(f"{inst}{resp['nextRecordsUrl']}", headers=headers\).json\(\)
        records.extend\(resp.get\('records', []\)\)
    return records


def print_results\(label, records\):
    """結果を整形して表示"""
    print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
    print\(f"  {label}"\)
    print\(f"{'='*60}"\)
    if not records:
        print\("  \(結果なし\)"\)
        return
    for rec in records:
        filtered = {k: v for k, v in rec.items\(\) if k != 'attributes'}
        parts = []
        for k, v in filtered.items\(\):
            parts.append\(f"{k}: {v}"\)
        print\(f"  {' | '.join\(parts\)}"\)
    print\(f"  --- 合計 {len\(records\)} 行 ---"\)


def main\(\):
    print\("Salesforce認証中..."\)
    inst, token = authenticate\(\)
    print\(f"認証成功: {inst}"\)

    # クエリ1: Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' のみ
    q1 = \(
        "SELECT Status__c, COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "WHERE Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社' "
        "GROUP BY Status__c "
        "ORDER BY COUNT\(Id\) DESC"
    \)
    results1 = query_sf\(inst, token, q1\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ1: Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社'",
        results1
    \)

    # クエリ2: Company OR ServiceType__c
    q2 = \(
        "SELECT Status__c, COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "WHERE \(Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' OR ServiceType__c LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%'\) "
        "AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社' "
        "GROUP BY Status__c "
        "ORDER BY COUNT\(Id\) DESC"
    \)
    results2 = query_sf\(inst, token, q2\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ2: \(Company OR ServiceType__c LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%'\) AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社'",
        results2
    \)

    # クエリ3: 総件数
    q3 = \(
        "SELECT COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "WHERE \(Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' OR ServiceType__c LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%'\) "
        "AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社'"
    \)
    results3 = query_sf\(inst, token, q3\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ3: 総件数 \(Company OR ServiceType__c + 株式会社\)",
        results3
    \)

    # クエリ4: 全Lead Status__c 分布 \(上位20\)
    q4 = \(
        "SELECT Status__c, COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "GROUP BY Status__c "
        "ORDER BY COUNT\(Id\) DESC "
        "LIMIT 20"
    \)
    results4 = query_sf\(inst, token, q4\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ4: 全LeadのStatus__c分布 \(上位20件\)",
        results4
    \)

    print\("\\n完了。"\)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main\(\)

"""
一時スクリプト: 有料老人ホーム関連リードのフィールド調査とStatus分布を調査
"""
import sys
import os
import json

sys.path.insert\(0, r'C:\\Users\\fuji1\\OneDrive\\デスクトップ\\Salesforce_List'\)
from src.utils.config import sf_config
import requests


def authenticate\(\):
    """Salesforce OAuth認証"""
    r = requests.post\('https://login.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/token', data={
        'grant_type': 'refresh_token',
        'client_id': sf_config.CLIENT_ID,
        'client_secret': sf_config.CLIENT_SECRET,
        'refresh_token': sf_config.REFRESH_TOKEN,
    }\)
    token_data = r.json\(\)
    inst = token_data['instance_url']
    token = token_data['access_token']
    return inst, token


def query_sf\(inst, token, soql\):
    """SOQLクエリを実行し、全レコードを取得"""
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    url = f"{inst}/services/data/v59.0/query"
    resp = requests.get\(url, headers=headers, params={'q': soql}\).json\(\)
    
    if isinstance\(resp, list\) and len\(resp\) > 0 and 'errorCode' in resp[0]:
        print\(f"  エラー: {resp[0]['errorCode']} - {resp[0]['message']}"\)
        return []
    
    records = resp.get\('records', []\)
    while not resp.get\('done', True\):
        resp = requests.get\(f"{inst}{resp['nextRecordsUrl']}", headers=headers\).json\(\)
        records.extend\(resp.get\('records', []\)\)
    return records


def print_results\(label, records\):
    """結果を整形して表示"""
    print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
    print\(f"  {label}"\)
    print\(f"{'='*60}"\)
    if not records:
        print\("  \(結果なし\)"\)
        return
    for rec in records:
        filtered = {k: v for k, v in rec.items\(\) if k != 'attributes'}
        parts = []
        for k, v in filtered.items\(\):
            parts.append\(f"{k}: {v}"\)
        print\(f"  {' | '.join\(parts\)}"\)
    print\(f"  --- 合計 {len\(records\)} 行 ---"\)


def main\(\):
    print\("Salesforce認証中..."\)
    inst, token = authenticate\(\)
    print\(f"認証成功: {inst}"\)
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}

    # まず Lead オブジェクトの Status/ServiceType 関連フィールドを Describe で調査
    print\("\\n--- Lead オブジェクト: Status/Service 関連フィールド調査 ---"\)
    desc_url = f"{inst}/services/data/v59.0/sobjects/Lead/describe"
    desc_resp = requests.get\(desc_url, headers=headers\).json\(\)
    
    status_fields = []
    service_fields = []
    for f in desc_resp.get\('fields', []\):
        name_lower = f['name'].lower\(\)
        label_lower = \(f.get\('label'\) or ''\).lower\(\)
        if 'status' in name_lower or 'status' in label_lower:
            status_fields.append\(f\)
        if 'service' in name_lower or 'service' in label_lower or 'サービス' in label_lower:
            service_fields.append\(f\)
    
    print\("\\n  [Status関連フィールド]"\)
    for f in status_fields:
        print\(f"    {f['name']} \({f['label']}\) - type: {f['type']}"\)
    
    print\("\\n  [Service関連フィールド]"\)
    for f in service_fields:
        print\(f"    {f['name']} \({f['label']}\) - type: {f['type']}"\)

    # Status フィールド名を特定
    # 標準の Status フィールドは Lead では 'Status'（Status__c ではない）
    # ServiceType は Account のフィールドかもしれない

    # クエリ1: 標準 Status フィールドを使用
    print\("\\n\\n--- クエリ実行 ---"\)
    
    q1 = \(
        "SELECT Status, COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "WHERE Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社' "
        "GROUP BY Status "
        "ORDER BY COUNT\(Id\) DESC"
    \)
    results1 = query_sf\(inst, token, q1\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ1: Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社' \(GROUP BY Status\)",
        results1
    \)

    # クエリ2: Company のみで検索（ServiceType__c がLeadにない可能性）
    q2 = \(
        "SELECT Status, COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "WHERE Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社' "
        "GROUP BY Status "
        "ORDER BY COUNT\(Id\) DESC"
    \)
    results2 = query_sf\(inst, token, q2\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ2: Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社'",
        results2
    \)

    # クエリ3: 総件数
    q3 = \(
        "SELECT COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "WHERE Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社'"
    \)
    results3 = query_sf\(inst, token, q3\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ3: 総件数 \(Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' + 株式会社\)",
        results3
    \)

    # ServiceType__c 相当のフィールドがあるか確認してから条件追加
    # service_fields から適切なフィールド名を見つける
    service_field_name = None
    for f in service_fields:
        if 'type' in f['name'].lower\(\) or 'サービス' in \(f.get\('label'\) or ''\):
            service_field_name = f['name']
            break
    
    if service_field_name:
        print\(f"\\n  ServiceTypeフィールド発見: {service_field_name}"\)
        q3b = \(
            f"SELECT Status, COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
            f"FROM Lead "
            f"WHERE \(Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' OR {service_field_name} LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%'\) "
            f"AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社' "
            f"GROUP BY Status "
            f"ORDER BY COUNT\(Id\) DESC"
        \)
        results3b = query_sf\(inst, token, q3b\)
        print_results\(
            f"クエリ3b: \(Company OR {service_field_name} LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%'\) AND 株式会社",
            results3b
        \)
        
        q3c = \(
            f"SELECT COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
            f"FROM Lead "
            f"WHERE \(Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' OR {service_field_name} LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%'\) "
            f"AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社'"
        \)
        results3c = query_sf\(inst, token, q3c\)
        print_results\(
            f"クエリ3c: 総件数 \(Company OR {service_field_name} + 株式会社\)",
            results3c
        \)
    else:
        print\("\\n  ServiceType関連フィールドがLeadに見つかりません。"\)

    # クエリ4: 全Lead Status 分布 \(上位20\)
    q4 = \(
        "SELECT Status, COUNT\(Id\) cnt "
        "FROM Lead "
        "GROUP BY Status "
        "ORDER BY COUNT\(Id\) DESC "
        "LIMIT 20"
    \)
    results4 = query_sf\(inst, token, q4\)
    print_results\(
        "クエリ4: 全LeadのStatus分布 \(上位20件\)",
        results4
    \)

    print\("\\n完了。"\)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main\(\)
PYEOF)

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
有料老人ホーム × 株式会社 リードの所有者変更用調査スクリプト
対象: 未架電 + 架電OK接触なし のリード
"""

import sys
import os
from collections import Counter

sys.path.insert\(0, r'C:\\Users\\fuji1\\OneDrive\\デスクトップ\\Salesforce_List'\)
from src.utils.config import sf_config
import requests

# === 認証 ===
print\("=== Salesforce認証中... ==="\)
r = requests.post\('https://login.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/token', data={
    'grant_type': 'refresh_token',
    'client_id': sf_config.CLIENT_ID,
    'client_secret': sf_config.CLIENT_SECRET,
    'refresh_token': sf_config.REFRESH_TOKEN,
}\)
token_data = r.json\(\)
inst = token_data['instance_url']
token = token_data['access_token']
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
print\(f"認証成功: {inst}"\)


def query_all\(inst, token, soql\):
    """SOQLクエリを全件取得する"""
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    url = f"{inst}/services/data/v59.0/query"
    records = []
    resp = requests.get\(url, headers=headers, params={'q': soql}\).json\(\)
    records.extend\(resp.get\('records', []\)\)
    while not resp.get\('done', True\):
        resp = requests.get\(f"{inst}{resp['nextRecordsUrl']}", headers=headers\).json\(\)
        records.extend\(resp.get\('records', []\)\)
    return records


# === 松風のユーザーID検索 ===
users = query_all\(inst, token, "SELECT Id, Name FROM User WHERE Name LIKE '%松風%' AND IsActive = true"\)
print\("\\n=== 松風 ユーザー検索結果 ==="\)
for u in users:
    print\(f"  ID: {u['Id']}, Name: {u['Name']}"\)

# === 対象リードのクエリ ===
leads = query_all\(inst, token,
    "SELECT Id, Company, Status, Owner.Name, Phone, Prefecture__c, LegalPersonality__c "
    "FROM Lead "
    "WHERE Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' "
    "AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社' "
    "AND \(Status = '未架電' OR Status = '00 架電OK - 接触なし'\) "
    "ORDER BY Status, Prefecture__c"\)

print\(f"\\n=== 対象リード: {len\(leads\)}件 ==="\)

# Status別集計
print\(f"\\n--- Status別 ---"\)
status_counts = Counter\(l['Status'] for l in leads\)
for s, c in status_counts.most_common\(\):
    print\(f"  {s}: {c}件"\)

# 現在のOwner分布
print\(f"\\n--- 現在のOwner分布 ---"\)
owner_counts = Counter\(l['Owner']['Name'] for l in leads\)
for o, c in owner_counts.most_common\(\):
    print\(f"  {o}: {c}件"\)

# 都道府県分布
print\(f"\\n--- 都道府県分布 ---"\)
pref_counts = Counter\(l.get\('Prefecture__c', '\(空\)'\) for l in leads\)
for p, c in pref_counts.most_common\(10\):
    print\(f"  {p}: {c}件"\)

# サンプルレコード表示
print\(f"\\n--- サンプル（先頭10件）---"\)
for i, l in enumerate\(leads[:10]\):
    print\(f"  {i+1}. {l['Company']} | {l['Status']} | Owner: {l['Owner']['Name']} | {l.get\('Prefecture__c', ''\)} | {l.get\('Phone', ''\)}"\)

# 全リードID出力
print\(f"\\n--- 全リードID ---"\)
for l in leads:
    print\(l['Id']\)
SCRIPT_EOF)

"""
株式会社_有料老人ホーム リードのOwner更新スクリプト
対象: Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社'
      AND \(Status = '未架電' OR Status = '00 架電OK - 接触なし'\)
更新先: 松風 穂香 \(0055i00000CwGDpAAN\)
"""

import sys
import os
import json
import time

sys.path.insert\(0, r'C:\\Users\\fuji1\\OneDrive\\デスクトップ\\Salesforce_List'\)
from src.utils.config import sf_config
import requests

# === 1. Salesforce認証 ===
print\("=" * 60\)
print\("Salesforce認証中..."\)
print\("=" * 60\)

r = requests.post\('https://login.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/token', data={
    'grant_type': 'refresh_token',
    'client_id': sf_config.CLIENT_ID,
    'client_secret': sf_config.CLIENT_SECRET,
    'refresh_token': sf_config.REFRESH_TOKEN,
}\)
token_data = r.json\(\)
inst = token_data['instance_url']
token = token_data['access_token']
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
print\(f"認証成功: {inst}"\)


def query_all\(inst, token, soql\):
    """SOQLクエリを全件取得する"""
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    url = f"{inst}/services/data/v59.0/query"
    records = []
    resp = requests.get\(url, headers=headers, params={'q': soql}\).json\(\)
    records.extend\(resp.get\('records', []\)\)
    while not resp.get\('done', True\):
        resp = requests.get\(f"{inst}{resp['nextRecordsUrl']}", headers=headers\).json\(\)
        records.extend\(resp.get\('records', []\)\)
    return records


# === 2. 対象リードのクエリ ===
print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\("対象リードを検索中..."\)
print\("=" * 60\)

leads = query_all\(inst, token,
    "SELECT Id, Company, Status, Owner.Name, Phone, Prefecture__c "
    "FROM Lead "
    "WHERE Company LIKE '%有料老人ホーム%' "
    "AND LegalPersonality__c = '株式会社' "
    "AND \(Status = '未架電' OR Status = '00 架電OK - 接触なし'\) "
    "ORDER BY Status, Prefecture__c"\)
print\(f"対象リード: {len\(leads\)}件"\)

# 内訳表示
if leads:
    status_counts = {}
    for l in leads:
        s = l.get\('Status', '不明'\)
        status_counts[s] = status_counts.get\(s, 0\) + 1
    print\("\\nステータス別内訳:"\)
    for s, c in sorted\(status_counts.items\(\)\):
        print\(f"  {s}: {c}件"\)

    # サンプル表示
    print\("\\nサンプル（先頭5件）:"\)
    for l in leads[:5]:
        owner_name = l.get\('Owner', {}\).get\('Name', '不明'\) if l.get\('Owner'\) else '不明'
        print\(f"  {l['Id']} | {l.get\('Company', ''\)} | {l.get\('Status', ''\)} | Owner: {owner_name} | {l.get\('Prefecture__c', ''\)}"\)


# === 3. Owner更新（Composite API） ===
print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\("Owner更新実行中..."\)
print\("=" * 60\)

matsukaze_id = '0055i00000CwGDpAAN'
lead_ids = [l['Id'] for l in leads]

batch_size = 200
success_count = 0
error_count = 0
errors = []

for i in range\(0, len\(lead_ids\), batch_size\):
    batch = lead_ids[i:i + batch_size]
    batch_num = i // batch_size + 1
    total_batches = \(len\(lead_ids\) + batch_size - 1\) // batch_size
    print\(f"  バッチ {batch_num}/{total_batches}: {len\(batch\)}件処理中..."\)

    records = [{"attributes": {"type": "Lead"}, "Id": lid, "OwnerId": matsukaze_id} for lid in batch]

    url = f"{inst}/services/data/v59.0/composite/sobjects"
    resp = requests.patch\(url, headers=headers, json={"records": records, "allOrNone": False}\)

    if resp.status_code == 200:
        results = resp.json\(\)
        for j, result in enumerate\(results\):
            if result.get\('success'\):
                success_count += 1
            else:
                error_count += 1
                errors.append\(f"  {batch[j]}: {result.get\('errors'\)}"\)
    else:
        print\(f"  API Error: {resp.status_code} - {resp.text}"\)
        error_count += len\(batch\)

print\(f"\\n=== Owner更新結果 ==="\)
print\(f"成功: {success_count}件"\)
print\(f"失敗: {error_count}件"\)
if errors:
    print\("エラー詳細:"\)
    for e in errors:
        print\(e\)


# === 4. レポート作成 ===
print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\("レポート作成中..."\)
print\("=" * 60\)

report_metadata = {
    "reportMetadata": {
        "name": "株式会社_有料老人ホーム_松風担当リード",
        "reportFormat": "TABULAR",
        "reportType": {"type": "LeadList"},
        "detailColumns": [
            "LEAD.STATUS",
            "COMPANY",
            "Lead.LegalPersonality__c",
            "Lead.Prefecture__c",
            "PHONE",
            "LEAD.MOBILE_PHONE",
            "LEAD_OWNER",
            "CREATED_DATE"
        ],
        "reportFilters": [
            {
                "column": "COMPANY",
                "operator": "contains",
                "value": "有料老人ホーム"
            },
            {
                "column": "Lead.LegalPersonality__c",
                "operator": "equals",
                "value": "株式会社"
            },
            {
                "column": "LEAD_OWNER",
                "operator": "equals",
                "value": "松風 穂香"
            },
            {
                "column": "LEAD.STATUS",
                "operator": "equals",
                "value": "未架電,00 架電OK - 接触なし"
            }
        ],
        "sortBy": [
            {"sortColumn": "LEAD.STATUS", "sortOrder": "Asc"}
        ]
    }
}

url = f"{inst}/services/data/v59.0/analytics/reports"
resp = requests.post\(url, headers=headers, json=report_metadata\)
print\(f"\\n=== レポート作成 ==="\)
print\(f"Status: {resp.status_code}"\)
if resp.status_code in [200, 201]:
    report_data = resp.json\(\)
    report_id = report_data.get\('reportMetadata', {}\).get\('id', ''\)
    report_name = report_data.get\('reportMetadata', {}\).get\('name', ''\)
    print\(f"レポートID: {report_id}"\)
    print\(f"レポート名: {report_name}"\)
    print\(f"URL: {inst}/lightning/r/Report/{report_id}/view"\)
else:
    print\(f"Error: {resp.text}"\)
    # sortByが原因の場合、sortByを削除してリトライ
    del report_metadata['reportMetadata']['sortBy']
    resp2 = requests.post\(url, headers=headers, json=report_metadata\)
    print\(f"\\nRetry Status: {resp2.status_code}"\)
    if resp2.status_code in [200, 201]:
        report_data = resp2.json\(\)
        report_id = report_data.get\('reportMetadata', {}\).get\('id', ''\)
        print\(f"レポートID: {report_id}"\)
        print\(f"URL: {inst}/lightning/r/Report/{report_id}/view"\)
    else:
        print\(f"Retry Error: {resp2.text}"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\("処理完了"\)
print\("=" * 60\)
PYEOF)
